description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4.0 Docker image with a global before_script that runs ruby -v, which ruby, gem environment, installs rubygems‑update (latest and version 2.6.3), updates RubyGems to 2.6.10, installs bundler without docs, shows gem environment again, and runs bundle install with parallel jobs. Define the default test stage and a deploy stage for the pages job. Add a rubocop job in the test stage that executes the single command rubocop. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs gem install yard, bundle exec yard, bundle exec rake test, creates a public directory, moves coverage and documentation into public/coverage and public/YARD, creates a YARD coverage index file, appends yard stats to it, processes the file with a ruby one‑liner, lists the repository contents, and publishes the public/ folder as an artifact, but only on the master and gitlab-pages-yard-coverage branches. Add test-2.2.2, test-2.2.3, test-2.2.4, test-2.2.5, test-2.2.6, test-2.3.0, test-2.3.1, test-2.3.2, test-2.3.3, test-2.4.0 jobs, each in the test stage, using the corresponding ruby:<version> image and running bundle exec rake test.
